title: Adventurer's Spicy Flank Steak
description: A peppery, crispy Japanese dish featuring beef flank steak with a dash of adventure and Korean dumplings for an added texture and flavor.
instructions: Season the beef with kosher salt and let it rest for at least 10 minutes.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add vegetable oil, then sear the flank steak on all sides until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and let it rest for another few minutes before slicing thinly against the grain. Set aside.
In the same pan, add more oil if needed. Stir-fry garlic until fragrant, then add red pepper flakes, soy sauce, mirin, and fish sauce (if using) to taste. Simmer gently for about 1 minute.
Fold in Korean dumplings and braise for a couple of minutes or until heated through.
Add sliced flank steak to the pan with dumplings and toss everything together. Top with sesame seeds before serving.
